memory_text: Session 8 (1:51 pm on 15 July, 2023): Caroline said, "Last Friday I went to a council meeting for adoption."

Caroline is pursuing adoption. On Friday, July 14, 2023 (the day before the July 15 session), she attended an adoption council meeting. She described it as inspiring and emotional—seeing many people who wanted to create loving homes for children in need made her even more determined to adopt.

## Session 8  (date: 1:51 pm on 15 July, 2023)
[D8:9] Caroline: Last Friday I went to a council meeting for adoption. It was inspiring and emotional - so many people wanted to create loving homes for children in need. It made me even more determined to adopt.

Jon and Gina both lost their jobs (Jon was a banker, Gina worked at Door Dash) and both started their own businesses (Jon opened a dance studio, Gina started an online clothing store). They both share a passion for dance - it's their stress relief and they've both competed in dance competitions. They support each other's entrepreneurial journeys throughout the conversations.

Jon and Gina both lost their jobs (Jon was a banker, Gina worked at Door Dash) and each started their own business (Jon: dance studio, Gina: online clothing store). They share a deep passion for dance - both use it as stress relief and a way to express themselves. They consistently support each other's entrepreneurial journeys and dreams.
